questionHtml: Outline how Targeted Alpha Therapy (TAT) is used for treating cancers that have spread throughout the body.
markschemeHtml:
Any two of:

radiation source delivered directly to «targeted» cancer cells

by a carrier drug/protein/antibody

several sites in body can be targeted «at same time»

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Outline how Targeted Alpha Therapy (TAT) is used for treating cancers that have spread throughout the body.
